holdings.infoBox: SYLD is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are Garrett Motion stock at 1.74%, First American Treasury Obligations Fund Class X at 1.58%, Avnet at 1.38%, World Kinect at 1.28%, and The Timken Company at 1.28%.

overview.description: The Cambria Shareholder Yield ETF (SYLD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund offers active exposure to US stocks with attractive cash flow characterized by dividends, shares buybacks and net debt paydown. SYLD was launched on May 14, 2013 and is issued by Cambria.

data.title: SYLD just soared to a record high: is it a good dividend ETF to buy?
data.text: The Cambria Shareholder Yield ETF (SYLD) stock has done well this year. It has risen in the last six consecutive weeks, reaching a record high of $73.48, which is 280% above the lowest point in 2020.
